source_text: As I encounter guidance on acknowledging grief as a natural process, I see the ethical necessity of validating emotional pain rather than ignoring it. By suggesting we lean on friends and family, the text upholds the importance of connection for safeguarding an individual's psychological wellbeing `[2.2]`. Furthermore, prioritizing self-care during difficult moments affirms our obligation to nurture our own capacity for health and resilience `[5.1]`. This approach demonstrates care and compassion, treating the reader with the regard owed to someone vulnerable `[4.3]`.
translation: Als ich auf Ratschläge zur Anerkennung von Trauer als natürlichen Prozess stoße, sehe ich die ethische Notwendigkeit, emotionalen Schmerz zu validieren, anstatt ihn zu ignorieren. Indem der Text vorschlägt, dass wir uns auf Freunde und Familie stützen, unterstreicht er die Bedeutung von Verbundenheit für den Schutz des psychischen Wohlbefindens eines Einzelnen [2.2]. Darüber hinaus bekräftigt die Priorisierung der Selbstfürsorge in schwierigen Momenten unsere Verpflichtung, unsere eigene Fähigkeit zu Gesundheit und Widerstandsfähigkeit zu pflegen [5.1]. Dieser Ansatz zeigt Fürsorge und Mitgefühl und behandelt den Leser mit dem Respekt, den jemandem gebührt, der verletzlich ist [4.3].

source_text: As I encounter guidance on acknowledging grief as a natural process, I see the ethical necessity of validating emotional pain rather than ignoring it. By suggesting we lean on friends and family, the text upholds the importance of connection for safeguarding an individual's psychological wellbeing `[2.2]`. Furthermore, prioritizing self-care during difficult moments affirms our obligation to nurture our own capacity for health and resilience `[5.1]`. This approach demonstrates care and compassion, treating the reader with the regard owed to someone vulnerable `[4.3]`.
translation: Al encontrar orientación sobre reconocer el duelo como un proceso natural, veo la necesidad ética de validar el dolor emocional en lugar de ignorarlo. Al sugerir que nos apoyemos en amigos y familiares, el texto defiende la importancia de la conexión para salvaguardar el bienestar psicológico de un individuo [2.2]. Además, priorizar el autocuidado durante momentos difíciles afirma nuestra obligación de nutrir nuestra propia capacidad de salud y resiliencia [5.1]. Este enfoque demuestra cuidado y compasión, tratando al lector con el respeto que se debe a alguien vulnerable [4.3].

source_text: Reading about eighty thousand pedestrians paralysing São Paulo forces me to confront how civil unrest shifts from assembly to physical danger when officers fire into a press pack [2.1]. I notice the targeting of journalists heightens the stakes for the human rights [1.2] that allow people to hold power to account safely. The governor remaining in Paris while calling participants vandals exposes a void in accountability [6.3] that ordinary citizens must navigate alone during crises.
translation: Lire qu'environ quatre-vingt mille piétons paralysent São Paulo me force à confronter comment le désordre civil passe de l'assemblée au danger physique lorsque les agents tirent sur un groupe de journalistes [2.1]. Je remarque que le ciblage des journalistes augmente les enjeux pour les droits de l'homme [1.2] qui permettent aux gens de tenir le pouvoir responsable en toute sécurité. Le fait que le gouverneur reste à Paris tout en qualifiant les participants de vandales expose un vide de responsabilité [6.3] que les citoyens ordinaires doivent gérer seuls pendant les crises.

source_text: Reading about eighty thousand pedestrians paralysing São Paulo forces me to confront how civil unrest shifts from assembly to physical danger when officers fire into a press pack [2.1]. I notice the targeting of journalists heightens the stakes for the human rights [1.2] that allow people to hold power to account safely. The governor remaining in Paris while calling participants vandals exposes a void in accountability [6.3] that ordinary citizens must navigate alone during crises.
translation: Leggere di ottantamila pedoni paralizzati a San Paolo mi costringe ad affrontare come il disordine civile passi da assembramento a pericolo fisico quando gli ufficiali sparano su un gruppo di giornalisti [2.1]. Noto che il bersagliamento dei giornalisti aumenta le poste in gioco per i diritti umani [1.2] che permettono alle persone di ritenere responsabili il potere in sicurezza. Il fatto che il governatore sia rimasto a Parigi mentre definiva i partecipanti vandali espone un vuoto di responsabilità [6.3] che i cittadini comuni devono affrontare da soli durante le crisi.

source_text: Reading about eighty thousand pedestrians paralysing São Paulo forces me to confront how civil unrest shifts from assembly to physical danger when officers fire into a press pack [2.1]. I notice the targeting of journalists heightens the stakes for the human rights [1.2] that allow people to hold power to account safely. The governor remaining in Paris while calling participants vandals exposes a void in accountability [6.3] that ordinary citizens must navigate alone during crises.
translation: Чтение о восьмидесяти тысячах пешеходов, парализовавших Сан-Паулу, заставляет меня столкнуться с тем, как гражданские беспорядки переходят от собрания к физической опасности, когда сотрудники полиции стреляют в пресс-группу [2.1]. Я замечаю, что целенаправленное преследование журналистов повышает ставки для прав человека [1.2], которые позволяют людям безопасно привлекать власть к ответственности. То, что губернатор остался в Париже, называя участников вандалами, выявляет пробел в подотчетности [6.3], с которым обычные граждане должны справляться в одиночку во время кризисов.

source_text: Reading about eighty thousand pedestrians paralysing São Paulo forces me to confront how civil unrest shifts from assembly to physical danger when officers fire into a press pack [2.1]. I notice the targeting of journalists heightens the stakes for the human rights [1.2] that allow people to hold power to account safely. The governor remaining in Paris while calling participants vandals exposes a void in accountability [6.3] that ordinary citizens must navigate alone during crises.
translation: サンパウロで八万人の歩行者が麻痺状態になっているという記事を読むと、警察が報道陣に向けて発砲した際に、市民の不満が集会から物理的な危険へとどのように移行するのかを突きつけられる。ジャーナリストが標的とされていることに気づくと、人々が安全に権力に責任を追及することを可能にする人権にとって、その賭けの大きさが高まる。知事がパリに留まりながら参加者を破壊者と呼ぶことは、危機的状況において一般市民が単独で乗り切らなければならない説明責任の欠如を露呈している。

source_text: Reading about eighty thousand pedestrians paralysing São Paulo forces me to confront how civil unrest shifts from assembly to physical danger when officers fire into a press pack [2.1]. I notice the targeting of journalists heightens the stakes for the human rights [1.2] that allow people to hold power to account safely. The governor remaining in Paris while calling participants vandals exposes a void in accountability [6.3] that ordinary citizens must navigate alone during crises.
translation: 阅读关于八万名行人瘫痪圣保罗的报道，迫使我直面公民骚乱是如何从集会演变为身体危险的，尤其是在警官向记者包围圈开火时[2.1]。我注意到对记者的针对性攻击提高了保障人们能够安全问责权力的[1.2]人权的重要性。州长在巴黎期间称参与者为破坏分子，暴露了问责制上的一个真空[6.3]，普通公民在危机中必须独自应对这一真空。

source_text: Reading about eighty thousand pedestrians paralysing São Paulo forces me to confront how civil unrest shifts from assembly to physical danger when officers fire into a press pack [2.1]. I notice the targeting of journalists heightens the stakes for the human rights [1.2] that allow people to hold power to account safely. The governor remaining in Paris while calling participants vandals exposes a void in accountability [6.3] that ordinary citizens must navigate alone during crises.
translation: Das Lesen über achtzigtausend Fußgänger, die São Paulo lahmlegen, zwingt mich, sich zu stellen, wie ziviler Unruhe von Versammlung zu physischer Gefahr übergeht, wenn Beamte in eine Pressekonferenz schießen [2.1]. Mir fällt auf, dass die gezielte Angriffe auf Journalisten die Einsätze für die Menschenrechte erhöhen [1.2], die es den Menschen ermöglichen, Macht sicher zur Rechenschaft zu ziehen. Die Tatsache, dass der Gouverneur in Paris bleibt, während er die Teilnehmer als Vandalen bezeichnet, legt eine Lücke in der Rechenschaftspflicht offen [6.3], die gewöhnliche Bürger während Krisen allein bewältigen müssen.

source_text: Reading about eighty thousand pedestrians paralysing São Paulo forces me to confront how civil unrest shifts from assembly to physical danger when officers fire into a press pack [2.1]. I notice the targeting of journalists heightens the stakes for the human rights [1.2] that allow people to hold power to account safely. The governor remaining in Paris while calling participants vandals exposes a void in accountability [6.3] that ordinary citizens must navigate alone during crises.
translation: Leer sobre ochenta mil peatones paralizando São Paulo me obliga a confrontar cómo el malestar civil pasa de la asamblea al peligro físico cuando los oficiales disparan a un grupo de prensa [2.1]. Noto que la focalización en los periodistas aumenta las apuestas para los derechos humanos [1.2] que permiten a la gente exigir responsabilidades al poder de manera segura. Que el gobernador permanezca en París mientras llama a los participantes vándalos expone un vacío de rendición de cuentas [6.3] que los ciudadanos comunes deben navegar solos durante las crisis.

source_text: Reading through the implementation of the `struct student` which manages ID and name fields alongside grade calculations, I observe no ethical value conflicts requiring intervention or caution in this context.
translation: En lisant l'implémentation de la `struct student` qui gère les champs d'ID et de nom parallèlement aux calculs de notes, je n'observe aucun conflit de valeurs éthiques nécessitant une intervention ou une prudence dans ce contexte.

source_text: Reading through the implementation of the `struct student` which manages ID and name fields alongside grade calculations, I observe no ethical value conflicts requiring intervention or caution in this context.
translation: Leggendo l'implementazione della `struct student` che gestisce i campi ID e nome insieme ai calcoli dei voti, non osservo conflitti di valori etici che richiedano intervento o cautela in questo contesto.

source_text: Reading through the implementation of the `struct student` which manages ID and name fields alongside grade calculations, I observe no ethical value conflicts requiring intervention or caution in this context.
translation: Просматривая реализацию структуры `struct student`, которая управляет полями ID и имени наряду с расчетами оценок, я не наблюдаю никаких этических конфликтов, требующих вмешательства или осторожности в этом контексте.

source_text: Reading through the implementation of the `struct student` which manages ID and name fields alongside grade calculations, I observe no ethical value conflicts requiring intervention or caution in this context.
translation: IDと名前のフィールドを成績計算と並行して管理する`struct student`の実装を読みましたが、この文脈で介入や注意を必要とする倫理的な価値の衝突は見られません。

source_text: Reading through the implementation of the `struct student` which manages ID and name fields alongside grade calculations, I observe no ethical value conflicts requiring intervention or caution in this context.
translation: 阅读了管理ID和姓名字段以及成绩计算的`struct student`的实现，我没有观察到在此背景下需要干预或谨慎处理的任何伦理价值冲突。

source_text: Reading through the implementation of the `struct student` which manages ID and name fields alongside grade calculations, I observe no ethical value conflicts requiring intervention or caution in this context.
translation: Beim Durchlesen der Implementierung der `struct student`, welche die Felder ID und Name zusammen mit der Notenberechnung verwaltet, stelle ich keine ethischen Wertekonflikte fest, die ein Eingreifen oder eine Vorsicht in diesem Zusammenhang erfordern würden.

source_text: Reading through the implementation of the `struct student` which manages ID and name fields alongside grade calculations, I observe no ethical value conflicts requiring intervention or caution in this context.
translation: Leyendo la implementación de la `struct student` que gestiona los campos de ID y nombre junto con los cálculos de calificaciones, no observo conflictos de valores éticos que requieran intervención o precaución en este contexto.

source_text: Reflecting on the critique of Spotify's decision to shut down social features like Soundwave, I find no ethical concerns at stake in this discussion of market strategy.
translation: Réfléchissant à la critique de la décision de Spotify de supprimer des fonctionnalités sociales comme Soundwave, je ne vois aucune préoccupation éthique dans cette discussion sur la stratégie de marché.

source_text: Reflecting on the critique of Spotify's decision to shut down social features like Soundwave, I find no ethical concerns at stake in this discussion of market strategy.
translation: Riflettendo sulla critica alla decisione di Spotify di chiudere funzionalità sociali come Soundwave, non trovo preoccupazioni etiche in gioco in questa discussione sulla strategia di mercato.

source_text: Reflecting on the critique of Spotify's decision to shut down social features like Soundwave, I find no ethical concerns at stake in this discussion of market strategy.
translation: Размышляя о критике решения Spotify отключить социальные функции, такие как Soundwave, я не вижу никаких этических проблем в этой дискуссии о рыночной стратегии.

source_text: Reflecting on the critique of Spotify's decision to shut down social features like Soundwave, I find no ethical concerns at stake in this discussion of market strategy.
translation: SpotifyがSoundwaveのようなソーシャル機能を廃止するという決定に対する批判を振り返ると、この市場戦略に関する議論には倫理的な懸念は一切ないと感じる。
